questionHtml: State and explain one modification that the student can make to reduce the fractional uncertainty for the change in temperature of the metal cube.
markschemeHtml:
smaller mass of cube OR hotter cube OR more mass of water OR colder water OR more precise thermometer ✓

 

Accept reference to repeating the experiment and taking mean values.

Accept any reasonable answer that increases change in temperature of the cube.

Do not accept more accurate thermometer

meta.title: State and explain one modification that the student can make to reduce the fractional uncertainty for the change in temperature of the metal cube.
